message:
feat(profiling): add commit sub-phase timing instrumentation

Add 5 new atomic counters breaking down commit wall-time into measurable
sub-phases: pre-txn setup, txn roundtrip, finalize sequencing, handle
finalize, and post-write maintenance.

Instrument both autocommit fast path and explicit COMMIT with
record_hot_path_duration calls. Wire counters into perf_runner's
HotPathConnectionCeremonyProfile and realdb_e2e test fixture.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

                 commit_refresh_count: 0,

                 execute_body_time_ns: 0,

+                commit_txn_roundtrip_time_ns: 0,
+                commit_finalize_seq_time_ns: 0,
+                commit_handle_finalize_time_ns: 0,
+                commit_post_write_maintenance_time_ns: 0,
                 finalize_post_publish_time_ns: 0,
                 column_default_evaluation_passes: 0,
                 prepared_table_engine_fresh_allocs: 1,
